compiled_state.title: Tier B: Port ticket-link.sh unlink (net-effective state + UNLINK) to rebar._commands
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
unlink (standalone 532-LOC script): pair-scoped, removes most-recently-created link, computes net-effective state, writes UNLINK matching the format ticket-graph.py reads. Must target promoted endpoint. test suites covering unlink.

Port behind REBAR_LEAF_WRITES, switch-wired at dispatcher + library. Default stays bash.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] unlink ported to rebar._commands, switch-wired at dispatcher + library
- [ ] Command's bash suite(s) green against REBAR_LEAF_WRITES=bash AND =python
- [ ] Error strings + exit codes byte-identical
- [ ] Default remains bash

comments.body: Ported in 8b4baf1b: _commands/unlink.py with the net-effective replay (LINK/UNLINK + SNAPSHOT fallback) + reciprocal-for-relates_to + orphan warning; UNLINK via seam; active-link guard reuses rebar.graph._is_active_link. Dual-run green bash AND python (link+unlink both python) on link (66), duplicates-supersedes (23), discovered-from (4) + library parity tests. Default stays bash.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
